arts.ttl: Man City players have found their joy - Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola says his team have rediscovered the "joy" in their job after a 6-0 Premier League win over Ipswich Town.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Sees €30M Base Offer Rejected for Nuno Mendes Alternative
arts.sum: The January transfer window offers Ruben Amorim his first opportunity to shape Manchester United according to his vision. While larger changes are expected in the summer, reports suggest Amorim has already set his sights on a key player from Paris Saint-Germain. arts.ttl: 'The kid is complete' - who is new Man City signing Reis?
arts.sum: As Manchester City complete the signing of Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis, BBC Sport looks at who the 18-year-old is and why he has been so in demand.

arts.ttl: Happy Erling Haaland is just the tonic for Pep Guardiola as Man City face date with destiny in crunch Champions League tie
arts.sum: OLIVER HOLT IN PARIS: Haaland does not appear too often on occasions like this but he batted away questions about the 115 Premier League charges his Manchester City side are facing.

arts.ttl: Man City charges had no impact on new deal - Haaland
arts.sum: Erling Haaland says he is "confident" Manchester City know what they are doing over the charges they face after signing a new long-term deal.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola welcomes back injured stars for must-win Champions League clash
arts.sum: Manchester City are currently 22nd in the new 32-team league phase table, leaving their hopes of qualification to the knock-out rounds hanging by a thread. The Premier League title is beyond the grasp of City this season, even if they can put together a characteristically strong late-season run of form.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest Set Sights on €70M-Rated Wolves Talent Amid Arsenal, PSG Links
arts.sum: Matheus Cunha has established himself as a key player for Wolverhampton Wanderers, showcasing his versatility in various attacking roles. The Brazilian has adapted seamlessly to the Premier League, thriving as an attacking midfielder, supporting striker, or even as a center-forward. arts.ttl: PSG Monitoring €100M-Rated Real Madrid Standout’s Situation for Possible Summer Move
arts.sum: Kylian Mbappé arriving at Real Madrid pushed the attacker players on the wing down one spot in the depth chart and the chatter around the Frenchman’s arrival was whether everyone would be happy with their playing time. arts.ttl: Haaland had no fears about Manchester City legal case before signing new deal
arts.sum: Striker never considered repercussions of legal battle Haaland signed nine-and-a-half-year deal this month Erling Haaland says he never considered the repercussions of Manchester City losing their legal battle with the Premier League before he signed his nine-and-a-half‑year contract extension. It is possible the league champions could be relegated if found guilty of a number of the 100‑plus charges brought against them for breaches of the competition’s financial rules. Haaland simply made plain his confidence in the club’s powerbrokers to achieve the outcome they desire. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: PSG sign Napoli forward Kvaratskhelia until 2029
arts.sum: Paris St-Germain sign Napoli and Georgia forward Khvicha Kvaratskhelia on a deal until June 2029.
